creator: dikshie@sfc.wide.ad.jp
text:
This is proposal to delete net/paris-traceroute.  
Reasons:
1.No update from upstream. 
  Legacy paris-traceroute is not supported anymore. 
  Upstream project moved to (new) libparistraceroute: https://github.com/libparistraceroute 

2.net/scamper implements paris-traceroute. 

therefore all paris-traceroute users should use scamper.
